name: Seafood Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 500°F with pizza stone.
2. Blend pesto and pizza sauce together.
3. Spread the blended sauce over the pizza dough.
4. Cover with remaining ingredients: crabmeat, mozzarella cheese, cooked prawns, cooked scallops, anchovy fillets, capers, olives, garlic, parsley, lemon zest, and red pepper flakes.
5. Place on pizza stone in oven and bake until golden brown.
